mapper.select: SELECT T.*, P.PRODUCT_TITLE as PRODUCT_NAME, U.USER_NAME as PARTNER_NAME FROM TRANSACTIN_HIST T JOIN PRODUCT P ON T.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO JOIN USER_INFO U ON (CASE WHEN T.SELLER_NO = #{loginUserNo} THEN T.RECEIVER_NO ELSE T.SELLER_NO END) = U.USER_NUM WHERE T.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} ORDER BY T.CREATE_DT DESC
